title: Meta Analysis Terms Core Vocabulary v1
source: BioMedPilot curated shared medical vocabulary checklist
curation_scope: Curated PICO/PICOS/PECO, study design, effect measure, outcome, diagnostic accuracy, heterogeneity, publication/exclusion type, and quality assessment terms for Meta Analysis workflows.

items.label: hazard ratio
items.ambiguity_notes: HR may also mean heart rate; use as effect measure in Meta Analysis context.

items.label: odds ratio
items.ambiguity_notes: OR must not match lowercase word or.

items.label: mean difference
items.ambiguity_notes: MD can be an abbreviation in other domains; keep as effect measure.

items.label: correlation coefficient
items.ambiguity_notes: Lowercase r is not added as a strict abbreviation to avoid broad matching.

items.label: confidence interval
items.ambiguity_notes: CI must not match ordinary text.

items.label: standard error
items.ambiguity_notes: SE is a short token requiring strict boundary matching.

items.label: p value
items.ambiguity_notes: Single P is not added as strict abbreviation to avoid broad matching.

items.label: overall survival
items.ambiguity_notes: OS is an outcome abbreviation only in Meta Analysis context.

items.label: complete response
items.ambiguity_notes: CR may also mean complete remission or other terms.

items.label: partial response
items.ambiguity_notes: PR can also mean progesterone receptor; keep ambiguous.

items.label: stable disease
items.ambiguity_notes: SD can also mean standard deviation; keep ambiguous.

items.label: progressive disease
items.ambiguity_notes: PD can also mean Parkinson disease; keep ambiguous.

items.label: ROBINS-I
zh_synonyms: 非随机研究偏倚风险工具
en_synonyms: Risk Of Bias In Non-randomized Studies of Interventions
expected_terms: Risk Of Bias In Non-randomized Studies of Interventions
非随机研究偏倚风险工具

items.label: QUADAS-2
zh_synonyms: 诊断准确性质量评价工具
en_synonyms: Quality Assessment of Diagnostic Accuracy Studies 2
expected_terms: Quality Assessment of Diagnostic Accuracy Studies 2
诊断准确性质量评价工具

items.label: AHRQ checklist
en_synonyms: Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality checklist
expected_terms: Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality checklist

items.label: GRADE
en_synonyms: Grading of Recommendations Assessment Development and Evaluation
expected_terms: Grading of Recommendations Assessment Development and Evaluation

items.label: diagnostic accuracy
items.ambiguity_notes: Diagnostic accuracy metric family, not a study design by itself.

ambiguity_terms.note: Odds ratio; must not match lowercase word or.
Overall survival in Meta Analysis context only.
Hazard ratio; may also mean heart rate.
Partial response; may also mean progesterone receptor.
Stable disease; may also mean standard deviation.
Progressive disease; may also mean Parkinson disease.
Confidence interval; short token requires strict boundary.
Mean difference; short token requires strict boundary.
Standard error; may also be broad abbreviation.
Risk ratio or relative risk; short token requires strict boundary.
